This field identifies the accounting system (system of record) that is the source of the data on this record.

An alternate account number for this account.For Payment Card Industry (PCI) processing of Credit Card accounts, this field could be used to contain the actual credit card number, and the ACCT-NUM uses the identifier for the Account.

The first Status Code for the account provided by the accounting system.If Recovery Accounting is used, this field is used for: Indicator for when account is in blocked status - no payments allowed or frozen status - no monetary transactions allowed.

The second Status Code for the account provided by the accounting system.If Recovery Accounting is used, this field is used for: Indicator for accounts accrual status - hard stop (no accruals) or memo stop (accrues into while-in-stop buckets).Values impact function of CACS Payoff Calculator.
The third Status Code for the account provided by the accounting system.If Recovery Accounting is used, this field is used for: Foreclosure Status
The fourth Status Code for the account provided by the accounting system.If Recovery Accounting is used, this field is used for: Repossession / Voluntary Surrender Status
